description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tests_full that runs when a pull request review is submitted. The workflow should only run if the review is approved and uses a matrix strategy to test on multiple OS (ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, macos-latest) and Python versions (3.10, 3.11, 3.12). For each job, cancel any previous runs, check out the repository, set up Python, install dependencies, install the package, run tests with coverage, and upload the coverage report to Codecov.
